data.biography:
Fort Thitipong Sangngey is a Thai actor under ABGroup and MeMindY. He studies in KMUTNB's Faculty of Engineering, Industrial Electrical and Energy.

Fort is best known for his lead role in the series "Love in the Air." He owns the fashion brand Trofi.
data.name: Thitipong Sangngey
